title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Technical Support III Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Jodhpur has declared its official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Technical Support III Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc BPT can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
